plotWithinBetween

plotWithinBetween.Rd

Violin plot comparing observed between/within variance components to a parametric bootstrap.

Usage

plotWithinBetween(observed, simulated)

Arguments

observed

A data frame returned by withinBetween.

simulated

A data frame returned by simWithinBetween.

Value

A ggplot object with one facet per variable, two violins (between, within) showing the bootstrap distribution, and a point overlay marking the observed value.

On this page
